title: Confirming a simplified GST/HST account number - Canada.ca
content:
## Confirming a simplified GST/HST account number
New rules for digital economy businesses are in effect as of July 1, 2021.
This information is for consumers and businesses who want to confirm that a digital economy business is registered for the simplified GST/HST and may charge the tax on supplies it makes in Canada.
The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) is required to publicly disclose information about businesses that have registered for the simplified GST/HST. The legal authority to use information for the purposes of this registry is found in the Excise Tax Act.
- Types of businesses listed in this registry
- Requirements to charge GST/HST
- Start a GST/HST registry search

## Types of businesses listed in this registry
This registry lists digital economy businesses who have applied to be registered for the simplified GST/HST and have been issued GST/HST numbers by the CRA.
Registration requirements are based on which digital economy measure applies to the business.
Simplified GST/HST registration is only available for digital economy businesses supplying:
- Cross-border digital products and services
- Platform-based short-term accommodation
To search for a business that is registered for the normal GST/HST, see Confirming a GST/HST account number .

## Requirements to charge GST/HST
If you are a consumer in Canada purchasing goods or services from a business listed in this registry, you may be charged GST/HST on those purchases.
If you are a business registered for the normal GST/HST in Canada purchasing goods or services from a business listed in this registry, you must provide that other business with evidence that you are registered for GST/HST in order not to be charged the tax. Otherwise, you will be charged the tax and cannot claim input tax credits or claim a rebate for the GST/HST you paid on those purchases.

## Start a GST/HST registry search
This list was updated on June 8, 2026 .

### Why a business may not be listed
You may not be able to find a business on this list if:
- it is registered for the normal GST/HST
- it does not meet the threshold amount required to have an obligation to register for the GST/HST
- it has not applied for registration for the simplified GST/HST
- its registration is not yet active
